mapper.select: SELECT id, content_id, version_number, title, body, changed_by, change_type, change_summary, created_at FROM content_version WHERE content_id = #{contentId} ORDER BY version_number DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, content_id, version_number, title, body, changed_by, change_type, change_summary, created_at FROM content_version WHERE content_id = #{contentId} ORDER BY version_number DESC
